title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.650 - Trustee in disincorporation — duties on conclusion of trust
text:
80.650.  Trustee in disincorporation — duties on conclusion of trust. — When the trustee shall have closed the affairs of the corporation, he shall pay over to the county commission all moneys remaining in his hands, and deliver to the clerk of such commission all books, papers, records and deeds belonging to the dissolved corporation.
(RSMo 1939 § 7303) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7152; 1919 § 8601; 1909 § 9489
